query:
INSERT INTO business_positions (businessEntityId, houseId, title, department, description, compensationType, salaryAmount, classificationType, status, maxHolders, currentHolders) VALUES
-- The L.A.W.S. Collective LLC (id=6) - Executive positions
(6, 1, 'Executive Director', 'Executive', 'Lead the L.A.W.S. Collective strategic vision and operations', 'salary', '137500.00', 'w2_officer', 'open', 1, 0),
(6, 1, 'Chief Financial Officer', 'Finance', 'Oversee all financial operations across entities', 'salary', '120000.00', 'w2_officer', 'open', 1, 0),
(6, 1, 'Operations Manager', 'Operations', 'Manage day-to-day operations and coordination', 'salary', '80000.00', 'w2_employee', 'open', 1, 0),
(6, 1, 'Marketing Director', 'Marketing', 'Lead marketing strategy and brand development', 'salary', '92500.00', 'w2_employee', 'open', 1, 0),
(6, 1, 'Technology Director', 'Technology', 'Oversee platform development and IT infrastructure', 'salary', '97500.00', 'w2_employee', 'open', 1, 0),

-- LuvOnPurpose Autonomous Wealth System LLC (id=5) - Consulting/Tech
(5, 1, 'LLC Formation Director', 'Legal', 'Guide entity formation and compliance processes', 'salary', '100000.00', 'w2_employee', 'open', 1, 0),
(5, 1, 'Trust Systems Director', 'Legal', 'Manage trust structures and governance systems', 'salary', '100000.00', 'w2_employee', 'open', 1, 0),
(5, 1, 'Automation Specialist', 'Technology', 'Develop and maintain automation workflows', 'salary', '85000.00', 'w2_employee', 'open', 1, 0),

-- LuvOnPurpose Outreach Temple and Academy Society (id=8) - Education
(8, 1, 'Academy Director', 'Education', 'Lead educational programs and curriculum development', 'salary', '105000.00', 'w2_employee', 'open', 1, 0),
(8, 1, 'Education/Training Director', 'Education', 'Oversee training programs and instructor development', 'salary', '105000.00', 'w2_employee', 'open', 1, 0),
(8, 1, 'Curriculum Developer', 'Education', 'Design and develop educational content', 'salary', '72500.00', 'w2_employee', 'open', 2, 0),
(8, 1, 'Program Manager - Youth', 'Programs', 'Manage youth-focused educational programs', 'salary', '72500.00', 'w2_employee', 'open', 1, 0),
(8, 1, 'Program Manager - Adult', 'Programs', 'Manage adult education and workforce programs', 'salary', '72500.00', 'w2_employee', 'open', 1, 0),

-- Real-Eye-Nation LLC (id=7) - Media/Content
(7, 1, 'Creative Director', 'Creative', 'Lead creative vision and content strategy', 'salary', '92500.00', 'w2_employee', 'open', 1, 0),
(7, 1, 'Content Producer', 'Creative', 'Produce multimedia content and materials', 'salary', '65000.00', 'w2_employee', 'open', 2, 0),
(7, 1, 'Social Media Manager', 'Marketing', 'Manage social media presence and engagement', 'salary', '55000.00', 'w2_employee', 'open', 1, 0);
